channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in the UK
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in the UK — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · Just released — verdict soon — Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a…

item.title: Lucky — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 6.2 · Decent one-time watch — When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must…

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.5 · Must watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: THE GHOST IN THE SHELL — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Japanese · ★ 8.8 · Must watch — 2029, a near-future Japan. The full cyborg Motoko Kusanagi envisions a task force that preemptively strikes emerging threats.

item.title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You — Crunchyroll
item.description: Crunchyroll · Japanese · ★ 9.0 · Must watch — Sasaki is an overworked salaryman drifting through the corporate grind, sustained by cigarettes and the cheerful service and smile of Yamada, the clerk at his…

item.title: Chainsmoker Cat — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.7 · Must watch — Catgirl Yani struggles to pay her rent and keep a job while feeding her smoking habit. As her loved ones' concerns grow, she must rethink her future.

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.8 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Young Washington — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — Before he led a nation, George Washington was a young soldier thrown into a global conflict. With alliances crumbling and war closing in, he must choose who to…

item.title: Silo — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Enola Holmes 3 — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

item.title: The Invite — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.7 · Must watch — Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.4 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: House of the Dragon — HBO Max Amazon Channel
item.description: HBO Max Amazon Channel · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Nirvanna the Band the Show the Movie — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.6 · Must watch — When their plan to book a show at the Rivoli goes horribly wrong, Matt and Jay accidentally travel back to the year 2008.
